column1: # CircleGuard - OWASP ZAP rule severity overrides
# threshold : OFF / LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH    (alert noise filter)
# newRisk   : INFO / LOW / MEDIUM / HIGH   (severity override)
# Rules are escalated to HIGH so they fail the baseline scan via the
# `-l HIGH` flag in `.gitlab/ci/zap.yml` (anything strictly below HIGH
# only shows as a warning in the report). Rule IDs map to:
#   A06 Vulnerable Components      ->  (covered by Trivy, not ZAP)
#   A09 Logging Failures           ->  (out of ZAP scope)

column4: Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens — fail build
CSP header not set — fail build
Cookie without Secure flag — fail build
Sensitive info in URL (admin paths) — fail build
Information Disclosure - Sensitive Info in HTTP Referrer
Suspicious comments — Java javadoc is not a leak
Cacheable content — admin static assets are deliberately cached
